description.plain: A modern full body mirror with a stainless steel frame, offering a sleek look and crystal clear reflection for any room.

unique_selling_points: Ultra-thin SUS 304 stainless steel frame with multiple mounting options and a choice of five finishes.
metadata.top_features:
Ultra-thin SUS 304 stainless steel frame: Provides a modern, minimalist look and easy wall mounting
4mm HD polished mirror: Delivers a distortion-free, crystal clear reflection for a full body view
Multiple mounting options: Can be mounted with D-ring or tab for both horizontal and vertical placement
Choice of five finishes: Available in matte black, brushed gold, brushed nickel, polished chrome, and brushed bronze to match any decor
Sturdy welded metal hanger rings: Ensures secure installation and enhanced safety
metadata.tech_specs:
Frame Material: SUS 304 stainless steel
Mirror Material: 4mm HD glass
Frame Thickness: 1 inch
Backboard Material: 9mm TSCA compliant MDF
Mounting Options: Tab mounted, D-ring mounted (horizontal/vertical)
Available Sizes: 18 x 48 in, 22 x 60 in, 30 x 48 in, 40 x 36 in, 55 x 30 in, 36 x 48 in
Finish Options: Matte black, brushed gold, brushed nickel, polished chrome, brushed bronze
